overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character following two companions through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The group walks along sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes futuristic skyscrapers and holographic advertisements in a dense urban cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with commercial storefronts

events.description: crossing the street at the yellow and green marked crosswalk with holographic walk signal

agents.ego_description: following two companions walking down the street toward the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: two companions walking ahead of the camera toward the intersection

entered.detail: tall illuminated skyscraper with spiral architectural design dominating the skyline
bright blue and white illuminated commercial sign on building facade
red cylindrical decorative lanterns hanging from building overhang
green holographic pedestrian crossing signal displaying walking figure
bold yellow and green striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit street in Night City at night, following two companions walking toward a crosswalk. The group crosses the street marked with yellow and green holographic walk signals, with a massive spiral skyscraper visible in the distance and commercial signs illuminating the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with neon-lit commercial buildings and closed storefronts

events.description: turning left onto sidewalk with distinctive pink neon-lit building facade

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past closed storefronts with prominent pink neon lighting

entered.detail: building facade illuminated with bright pink and magenta neon strip lighting
closed metal roll-down security shutters on ground floor storefronts
tall street light with horizontal lamp illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a narrower sidewalk dominated by a building with vibrant pink neon lighting. Walking past closed storefronts with metal security shutters, the spiral tower remains visible ahead while the street opens up to reveal more of the futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with digital billboards and crossing pedestrians

events.description: emerging from narrow sidewalk into wide open intersection with large digital displays
crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians while traffic waits

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with other pedestrians while heading toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black luxury sedan waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screen displaying promotional content on building wall
sleek black futuristic vehicle stopped at the crosswalk
futuristic curved pedestrian or vehicle overpass with red lighting accents

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow sidewalk, the scene opens into a wide intersection filled with moderate crowds crossing the street. A large digital billboard dominates the right side while a black luxury sedan waits at the crosswalk. The character crosses with the flow of pedestrians toward a distinctive blue building on the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside blue industrial building with barred windows

events.description: entering narrower sidewalk section next to blue building with metal-grated windows

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a blue building with barred windows, following other pedestrians ahead

entered.detail: smooth blue painted concrete building wall running along the sidewalk
rectangular windows with metal security bars and grates
narrow alleyway entrance between buildings with dim lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the character along a narrower sidewalk pressed against a distinctive blue building with metal-barred windows. The crowd thins out as the character continues walking past the industrial-looking facade, with the bright intersection and its digital billboards now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the neon-lit streets of Night City, transitioning from a wide urban crossing into a narrow industrial corridor. It begins by following two companions across a street marked with holographic walk signals, with a massive spiral skyscraper looming in the distance under the glow of commercial signs. As the group turns left, the environment shifts to a narrower sidewalk dominated by vibrant pink neon lighting and closed storefronts with metal security shutters. The scene then opens into a wide, crowded intersection where a large digital billboard and a black luxury sedan frame the path toward a distinctive blue building. Finally, the camera follows the character along a restricted sidewalk pressed against the blue building's metal-barred windows, leaving the bright lights of the intersection behind as the crowd thins.
